description_for_human: Agent-native version control. Track parallel agent changes, surface conflicts before they hit disk.
description_for_model: vcs-spike gives you structured change tracking for multi-agent coding workflows. Use vcs_stack_open at the start of every task, vcs_edit for every file you modify, and vcs_stack_close when done. If you detect conflicts via vcs_view_conflicts, report them — never resolve silently. The hub server (vcs serve) connects changes from separate projects so cross-project conflicts surface before deployment.
